description: Stable unique identifier for the position.
High-level asset class such as Equity Commodity or Option.
Instrument form such as Cash Equity Futures or Index Call Option.
Trading ticker contract code or OTC description.
ISIN where available; otherwise an internal or venue identifier.
Position quantity; negative values indicate shorts.
Market value in the instrument currency.
Call or Put for option positions.
Main market risk factor matching a downloaded time-series column when possible.
FX risk factor used for non-EUR instruments.
Volatility risk factor for option positions.
Local source file containing the time series or snapshot.
Exposure basis such as market_value_eur delta_adjusted_eur vega_eur or notional_eur.
EUR exposure amount for aggregation and reporting.
Beta sensitivity or scalar used to convert position exposure into factor exposure.
How the risk factor was assigned.
